field.label: Name
field.help: Unique name for this watcher (alphanumeric + underscores, max 32 chars).

field.label: Type
field.help: DNS Hostname: resolve a FQDN and sync resulting IPs into the alias. URL Table: fetch IP list from a URL.

field.label: Hostname
field.help: FQDN to resolve (for DNS type). Example: office.example.com

field.label: URL
field.help: URL to fetch IP list from (for URL Table type). One IP/CIDR per line. Lines starting with # are ignored.

field.label: Target Alias
field.help: OPNsense firewall alias to sync IPs into. Select an existing alias or create a new one. The alias is updated via pfctl -T replace (no filter reload).

field.label: Check Interval (seconds)
field.help: How often to check for changes. DNS: 10-300s recommended. URL: 300-86400s recommended.

field.label: Address Family
field.help: For DNS type: resolve IPv4 only (A records), IPv6 only (AAAA), or both.
